original_query: with inv as (select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy        ,stdev,mean, case mean when 0 then null else stdev/mean end cov  from(select w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy             ,stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) stdev,avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) mean       from inventory           ,item           ,warehouse           ,date_dim       where inv_item_sk = i_item_sk         and inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk         and inv_date_sk = d_date_sk         and d_year =2001         and i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Sports')         and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100         and inv_quantity_on_hand between 30 and 230       group by w_warehouse_name,w_warehouse_sk,i_item_sk,d_moy) foo  where case mean when 0 then 0 else stdev/mean end > 1) select inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean, inv1.cov         ,inv2.w_warehouse_sk,inv2.i_item_sk,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov from inv inv1,inv inv2 where inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk   and inv1.w_warehouse_sk =  inv2.w_warehouse_sk   and inv1.d_moy=1   and inv2.d_moy=1+1   and inv1.cov > 1.5 order by inv1.w_warehouse_sk,inv1.i_item_sk,inv1.d_moy,inv1.mean,inv1.cov         ,inv2.d_moy,inv2.mean, inv2.cov ;
rewritten_query:
WITH inv AS (
    SELECT 
        w_warehouse_sk,
        i_item_sk,
        d_moy,
        stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) AS stdev,
        avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) AS mean,
        (stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) / NULLIF(avg(inv_quantity_on_hand), 0)) AS cov
    FROM inventory
    JOIN item ON inv_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN warehouse ON inv_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON inv_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 2001
        AND i_category IN ('Shoes', 'Sports')
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 AND 100
        AND inv_quantity_on_hand BETWEEN 30 AND 230
    GROUP BY w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk, d_moy
    HAVING avg(inv_quantity_on_hand) != 0 
        AND (stddev_samp(inv_quantity_on_hand) / avg(inv_quantity_on_hand)) > 1
)
SELECT 
    inv1.w_warehouse_sk,
    inv1.i_item_sk,
    inv1.d_moy,
    inv1.mean,
    inv1.cov,
    inv2.w_warehouse_sk,
    inv2.i_item_sk,
    inv2.d_moy,
    inv2.mean,
    inv2.cov
FROM inv inv1
JOIN inv inv2 
    ON inv1.w_warehouse_sk = inv2.w_warehouse_sk 
    AND inv1.i_item_sk = inv2.i_item_sk
WHERE 
    inv1.d_moy = 1 
    AND inv2.d_moy = 2 
    AND inv1.cov > 1.5
ORDER BY 
    inv1.w_warehouse_sk, 
    inv1.i_item_sk, 
    inv1.d_moy, 
    inv1.mean, 
    inv1.cov, 
    inv2.d_moy, 
    inv2.mean, 
    inv2.cov;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Removed the unnecessary w_warehouse_name from the GROUP BY and SELECT clauses since it's not used in the final output
Eliminated the nested subquery by moving the coefficient of variation (cov) filter to a HAVING clause
Replaced implicit comma joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization potential
Simplified the CASE expression with NULLIF to handle division by zero more elegantly
